package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for response_envelope_shaping_duplicated_across_handlers: Repeated success-response envelope formatting that should live in a renderer or transport helper.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule147NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule147NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule147NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario147Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule147NegativeService, input Rule147NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
